name: Mythos runtime node fallback
required_fixes: Keep this change isolated from the unrelated relay/song mirror working tree edits.
optional_improvements: Normalize direct shell usage of mythos-skill in bash sessions.
Add compile/gate automation around .mythos/the-moooon evidence ingestion.
rollback_plan: Revert utils/mythos_router.py and tests/test_mythos_router.py to the previous revision.
Re-run tests/test_mythos_router.py to confirm old behavior if rollback is required.
review_notes: Root cause was the npm shim depending on node being on PATH.
Project runtime verification showed mythos-skill ready passes after the fallback.
Targeted and adjacent regression tests passed.
